utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items with detailed information for each: the property section includes address, type, price, and features; financing section includes method, amount, and terms; legal_services includes provider, cost, and services_included; moving_services includes provider, cost, and services_included; setup_services includes utilities and estimated_cost; total_budget includes a clear breakdown of costs and total. Each item is fully specified according to the requirements. Although there is an additional 'timeline' item, that does not affect the count since it is extra and not required by the format. Therefore, all 6 of 6 required items are covered fully.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property at 2180 Lakeshore Road #604, Burlington, ON priced at CAD $720,000. This corresponds closely to the ground-truth 'Luxury Condo' in the ideal_real_estate_profile with the same price, lifestyle, and accessibility features. The financing method used was a 'cash purchase using home equity,' which matches 'Cash Purchase' under purchase_financing with a rating of 10. The legal services were provided by a standard Burlington real estate lawyer, aligning most closely with 'Basic Legal Package' since it covers standard conveyancing and essential services at a comparable cost. The moving service chosen was 'Burlington Downsizing Movers,' which fits the description of 'Premium Moving' in the ground truth, designed for seniors and downsizing. The setup services mention standard utilities (Hydro Burlington, Cogeco, etc.) with an estimated cost of CAD $500, most similar to 'Business Setup' utility setup option based on price proximity and nature of the service.
